summary: During the Brookline Select Board meeting on January 13, 2026, the board discussed several topics, including an upcoming MLK Day event scheduled for January 27 and the nomination process for the Brookline Commission for Women. The board also addressed the implementation of public health vending machines at libraries to dispense safe sex kits and health-promoting materials to support community wellness efforts. Additionally, concerns were raised regarding real property strategy in executive session, and a proposal related to opioid overdose prevention was presented, focusing on distributing Narcan and other resources in public spaces. The meeting concluded with an invitation for public comments, though no additional comments were made [06:30][99:10][110:10][149:01][171:40].
title: Brookline Select Board Meeting - January 13, 2026
